bead.title: agentmetrics: GraphQL agentMetrics(window, groupBy) resolver + revision-keyed cache
bead.description: GraphQL resolver agentMetrics(window: 24h|7d|30d, groupBy: MODEL|HARNESS|PROVIDER|TIER) returning attempts, success_rate, mean+p50+p95 duration_ms, mean cost, effective cost/success, in/out tokens, last_seen_at. Revision-keyed cache (survives ADR-004 archive). Default window=7d; all-time removed from UI.
bead.acceptance: 1. agentMetrics query in GraphQL schema. 2. 4 axes supported (MODEL/HARNESS/PROVIDER/TIER). 3. 3 windows (24h/7d/30d). 4. Cache keyed by run-store revision. 5. Per-axis tests.
